evals.prompt: Can you review today's pipeline output quality? Check the workspace/test/ folder.
evals.expected_output: Skill produces a structured quality report: article funnel (raw→curated P0/P1/P2→summaries→script duration), source coverage per newsletter, spot-checked summary word counts vs targets, script segment coverage, overall pass/fail rating.
expectations: Reads raw_articles.json and reports total article count and count per source
Reads curated_articles.json and reports P0/P1/P2/P3 breakdown
Reads summaries.json and checks at least one summary word count against the target range
Reads podcast_script.json and reports the total_estimated_duration_min
Produces a structured report with an overall PASS/NEEDS ATTENTION/FAIL rating

evals.prompt: How many articles did we get from each newsletter today? And did the P0 summaries hit their word count targets? Check workspace/test/.
evals.expected_output: Per-source article counts from raw_articles.json, word count analysis of P0 summaries from summaries.json compared against the 300-500 word target from DESIGN.md.
expectations: Reports article count broken down by source (tldr_ai, tldr_tech, tldr_dev, techcrunch, harper_carroll)
Reads summaries.json and finds P0 summaries specifically
Reports word count for at least one P0 summary
Compares P0 word count against the 300-500 word target
Flags any P0 summary that falls outside the target range
